title: rubus gotthardensis
intro: Rubus gotthardensis, also known as the Gotthard Raspberry or Alpine Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Alps in Europe. This plant is rich in anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have been shown to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus gotthardensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus gotthardensis, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
